description: baseline: pretrained T5Chem, AdamW lr=5e-4, bs=32, dropout=0.1
MSE loss instead of KL divergence
regression head LR 2x vs pretrained body
SiLU activation instead of ReLU in FFN (pretrained weights incompatible)
label smoothing eps=0.05 on KL targets
Muon optimizer lr=0.002 (8453 steps, 36% slower than AdamW)
gradient centralization (zero-mean grads per output neuron)
manifold mixup alpha=0.2 at encoder embedding level
learnable regression query (replaces PAD token as decoder input)
batch size 32->16 (more steps but fewer total samples per budget)
T=256+d=0.10 (~111 epochs, 37% more steps, 1% seqs truncated)
T=275+d=0.09 (~118 epochs, 18% more steps, covers all seqs)
dropout on decoder output before regression head
random.seed(42) for data ordering (bad ordering, reveals luck in 5.3472)
SWA every 100 steps during warmdown (39 snapshots)
L1 loss on prediction (direct MAE optimization vs KL divergence)
Huber loss beta=0.05 (worse than pure L1)
L1+d=0.04 add masked enc_mean to dec_repr (decoder already captures this)
L1+d=0.04 encoder_dropout=0.0 (encoder dropout important for generalization)
L1+d=0.04 T=300->256 (more steps but 1% seqs truncated, worse)
BOS token as decoder input instead of PAD (PAD is correct for T5Chem regression)
L1+d=0.04 label noise sigma=2.0% yield (too noisy)
L1+d=0.04 decoder block dropout=0.0, encoder keeps 0.04
GELU activation in FFN (ReLU pretrained weights incompatible)
2-run continuation run2: from checkpoint + linear decay (worse, diff data order)
model soup 50-50 blend warmdown-start + final weights
reactant swap augmentation 50% prob during training
regression head 256->64->2 with ReLU hidden layer
R-drop KL consistency weight=0.1 (2x forward, 6943 steps)
yield-stratified batching 4 quartiles x8 per batch
L1 + pairwise ranking hinge loss weight=0.1
ceaa811 re-run #1 (data order variance: 4.8170 was lucky)
